summary: Price variance detected across all 4 line items. PO-2025-2002 locked prices at EUR 45.00/unit for TP-C210; invoice bills EUR 48.90 — a 8.67% increase. Similar overages on TP-B445 (+2.9%), TP-S119 (-0.5%). Total overbilling vs PO: EUR 183.80. Variance exceeds the 5% auto-approval tolerance threshold. Vendor has a pending contract amendment citing a raw material surcharge — amendment is not yet countersigned. Routing to Procurement for variance resolution before payment.

exceptions.description: TP-C210: Invoiced EUR 48.90 vs PO EUR 45.00 — variance +8.67% (EUR 195.00 total overage on 50 units)
TP-B445: Invoiced EUR 22.75 vs PO EUR 22.10 — variance +2.94% (EUR 19.50 total overage on 30 units)
exceptions.resolution: Within acceptable range if contract amendment is countersigned

agent_insights: Price variance 8.67% on TP-C210 exceeds 5% auto-approval threshold
Procurement review required: unsigned contract amendment VC-2025-TG-001 on file
GRN-2002-A confirms full quantity receipt — only price is disputed
Recommended: approve EUR 4,593.46 (PO price) and dispute EUR 183.80 overage
